proposal1.heroHeadline: Kids Industries is wasting 1,200 hours a year on manual proposal writing. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Right now, crafting each proposal eats up hours of your team’s time. With our AI, generate a full proposal in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies. They are ongoing losses impacting your bottom line.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent strengthening family brands. This means 50 hours each month lost to manual labor.

problems.title: Missed Deals
problems.description: A slow proposal turnaround results in lost opportunities. A delay of just one day can mean a competitor wins the deal instead.

problems.title: Brand Consistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals can weaken your brand's image. Each inconsistency costs you potential trust and credibility in the family market.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled team members to manually create proposals is costly. This results in an estimated $75,000 annually in unnecessary expenses.

problems.title: Creative Bottleneck
problems.description: Your creative team is bogged down with repetitive tasks. This reduces their capacity to innovate and focus on strategic initiatives.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: The pressure of tight deadlines leads to stress. The result is decreased productivity and higher turnover rates among your staff.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system is the solution to eliminate these losses.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft and revise. Our system delivers a polished, branded proposal in under a minute.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistencies in manual work can damage your brand. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand identity.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Manual processes inflate labor costs. Our system cuts these costs significantly by automating the proposal process.

solutions.title: Increased Capacity
solutions.description: Repetitive tasks limit your creative team's potential. With automation, they can focus on what they do best: creating.

solutions.title: Real-Time Insights
solutions.description: Tracking proposal status is currently manual and slow. Our system provides real-time updates and insights for better decision-making.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Kids Industries's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Kids Industries around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Kids Industries.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Family Market Reach with Kids Industries.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will enhance your brand's connection with families through targeted strategies and creative execution.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every day, Acme Corp is losing potential family-focused revenue.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: A 60% bounce rate means over half your visitors leave without engaging. That is lost potential customers daily.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: With a conversion rate under 2%, you're missing out on turning visitors into loyal customers. Each non-conversion is a missed sale.

problems.title: Ineffective Branding
problems.description: Your current branding fails to resonate with families, resulting in a lack of trust and loyalty. This is a huge loss in potential repeat business.

problems.title: Poor Market Insight
problems.description: Without deep market insights, you're missing opportunities to tailor your offerings. This results in products that don’t meet family needs.

problems.title: Limited Engagement
problems.description: Low engagement on social platforms means families are not connecting with your brand. This limits your reach and influence.

problems.title: Inadequate Content Strategy
problems.description: Without a strong content strategy, your message is lost in the noise. This leads to families overlooking your products.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions are designed to directly counter these losses with strategic interventions.

solutions.title: Creative Campaigns
solutions.description: Engage families with memorable campaigns that boost brand recognition and loyalty.

solutions.title: Market Research
solutions.description: Gain deep insights into family needs and preferences to tailor your offerings.

solutions.title: Digital Strategy
solutions.description: Transform your online presence to increase conversions and engagement.

solutions.title: Content Development
solutions.description: Craft compelling content that captivates and retains family audiences.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a chat about how we can work together to achieve your goals.

lead.company_description:
We make family targeted brands stronger by delivering award winning insight, strategy and content. We work across multiple disciplines and in multiple industries. We've got researchers, marketers, designers, strategists, geeks and psychologists. We've built new websites, award winning hotels for the family, developed new TV stations, created new cereals, launched new products and researched just about everything under the sun.

Unique? We think so. There is no other company in the world that offers our level of family understanding coupled with the ability to turn this into effective strategy and implementation.

We'd love to hear from you at hello@kidsindustries.com or give us a ring on 0203 432 8574
